title: Network security
subtitle: In-app IP access control and abuse auto-ban. Complements the reverse proxy and OS firewall — it does not replace them.
disabledHint: Both the IP access control and the auto-ban are OFF. Enable them with STREAMHUB_IP_ACCESS_MODE (log/enforce) and STREAMHUB_AUTOBAN_ENABLED=true in the server's .env, then restart the core.
envHint: Configuration is env-driven (STREAMHUB_IP_ACCESS_MODE, STREAMHUB_IP_ALLOWLIST_ONLY, STREAMHUB_AUTOBAN_*) — see the network-security docs. Loopback and private (RFC1918) addresses are always permitted and never banned, so you cannot lock yourself out of the box.

rules.title: Allow / block rules
rules.empty: No rules yet. Add a CIDR to allow or block a range — explicit allow always wins over block.

offenders.title: Recent offenders
offenders.empty: No offenses recorded in the current window.
